en: In the spring of the year, the time when kings go out to battle, David sent Joab, and his servants with him, and all Israel. And they ravaged the Ammonites and besieged Rabbah. But David remained at Jerusalem.
zh: 過了年，在列王出征的時候，大衛派遣約押和自己的臣僕，以及以色列眾軍一同出征。他們殲滅了亞捫人，並且包圍了拉巴。大衛卻留在耶路撒冷。

en: It happened, late one afternoon, when David arose from his couch and was walking on the roof of the king's house, that he saw from the roof a woman bathing; and the woman was very beautiful.
zh: 有一天近黃昏的時候，大衛從床上起來，在王宮的平頂上散步。他從平頂上看見一個婦人在洗澡；這婦人容貌非常美麗。

en: And David sent and inquired about the woman. And one said, "Is not this Bathsheba, the daughter of Eliam, the wife of Uriah the Hittite?"
zh: 大衛派人去查問那婦人是誰。有人說：“這不是以連的女兒、赫人烏利亞的妻子拔示巴嗎？”

en: So David sent messengers and took her, and she came to him, and he lay with her. (Now she had been purifying herself from her uncleanness.) Then she returned to her house.
zh: 於是大衛差派使者去把她接來。她來到大衛那裡，大衛就與她同房。那時她的月經剛得潔淨。事後，她就回家去了。

en: And the woman conceived, and she sent and told David, "I am pregnant."
zh: 後來那婦人懷了孕，就打發人去告訴大衛，說：“我懷孕了！”

en: So David sent word to Joab, "Send me Uriah the Hittite." And Joab sent Uriah to David.
zh: 大衛派人到約押那裡，說：“你打發赫人烏利亞到我這裡來。”約押就打發烏利亞去見大衛。

en: When Uriah came to him, David asked how Joab was doing and how the people were doing and how the war was going.
zh: 烏利亞來到大衛那裡，大衛就問約押和士兵可好，又問戰場上的情形怎樣。

en: Then David said to Uriah, "Go down to your house and wash your feet." And Uriah went out of the king's house, and there followed him a present from the king.
zh: 大衛對烏利亞說：“你回家去，洗洗腳吧！”烏利亞就離開了王宮。隨後王的一份禮物也跟著送去。

en: But Uriah slept at the door of the king's house with all the servants of his lord, and did not go down to his house.
zh: 烏利亞卻和他主人的臣僕一同睡在王宮門外，沒有回到自己家裡去。

en: When they told David, "Uriah did not go down to his house," David said to Uriah, "Have you not come from a journey? Why did you not go down to your house?"
zh: 有人告訴大衛說：“烏利亞沒有下到自己家裡去。”大衛就問烏利亞：“你不是從遠路回來嗎？為甚麼不下到自己家裡去呢？”

en: Uriah said to David, "The ark and Israel and Judah dwell in booths, and my lord Joab and the servants of my lord are camping in the open field. Shall I then go to my house, to eat and to drink and to lie with my wife? As you live, and as your soul lives, I will not do this thing."
zh: 烏利亞回答大衛說：“約櫃、以色列人和猶大人都住在棚裡，我主人約押和我主人的臣僕都在野地安營，我怎能回家吃喝，與妻子同睡呢？我指著王和王的生命發誓：我絕不敢作這樣的事。”

en: Then David said to Uriah, "Remain here today also, and tomorrow I will send you back." So Uriah remained in Jerusalem that day and the next.
zh: 大衛對烏利亞說：“你今天還留在這裡，明天我才打發你去。”那一天，烏利亞就留在耶路撒冷。

en: And David invited him, and he ate in his presence and drank, so that he made him drunk. And in the evening he went out to lie on his couch with the servants of his lord, but he did not go down to his house.
zh: 次日，大衛召了烏利亞來，叫烏利亞與他一起吃喝，使他喝醉。到了晚上，烏利亞出去，與他主人的臣僕一同睡在自己的床鋪上，還是沒有下到自己家裡去。

en: In the morning David wrote a letter to Joab and sent it by the hand of Uriah.
zh: 到了早晨，大衛寫了一封給約押的信，交烏利亞親手帶去。

en: In the letter he wrote, "Set Uriah in the forefront of the hardest fighting, and then draw back from him, that he may be struck down, and die."
zh: 他在信裡寫著說：“要把烏利亞派到戰鬥最猛烈的前線去，然後你們就退到他後邊，讓他被擊殺。”

en: And as Joab was besieging the city, he assigned Uriah to the place where he knew there were valiant men.
zh: 那時，約押正在圍城，他知道哪裡有強悍的守軍，就派烏利亞到那裡去。

en: And the men of the city came out and fought with Joab, and some of the servants of David among the people fell. Uriah the Hittite also died.
zh: 城裡的人出來，與約押交戰。大衛的僕人中有一些倒斃了，赫人烏利亞也死了。

en: Then Joab sent and told David all the news about the fighting.
zh: 於是，約押派人去把戰事的一切情形都報告大衛。

en: And he instructed the messenger, "When you have finished telling all the news about the fighting to the king,
zh: 他又吩咐那使者說：“你把戰事的一切情形對王說完了以後，

en: then, if the king's anger rises, and if he says to you, 'Why did you go so near the city to fight? Did you not know that they would shoot from the wall?
zh: 王若是大怒，責問你：‘你們為甚麼那樣靠近那城爭戰呢？你們不知道敵人會從城牆上射箭下來嗎？

en: Who killed Abimelech the son of Jerubbesheth? Did not a woman cast an upper millstone on him from the wall, so that he died at Thebez? Why did you go so near the wall?' then you shall say, 'Your servant Uriah the Hittite is dead also.'"
zh: 從前擊殺了耶路．比設的兒子亞比米勒的是誰呢？不是一個婦人從城牆上把一塊磨石丟在他身上，他就死在提備斯嗎？你們為甚麼靠近城牆呢？’你就回答：‘王的僕人赫人烏利亞也死了。’”

en: So the messenger went and came and told David all that Joab had sent him to tell.
zh: 於是那使者去了；他一來到，就把約押差遣他所要說的一切都報告了大衛。

en: The messenger said to David, "The men gained an advantage over us and came out against us in the field, but we drove them back to the entrance of the gate.
zh: 那使者又對大衛說：“那些人比我們強，他們出到曠野攻打我們，我們把他們趕回城門口。

en: Then the archers shot at your servants from the wall. Some of the king's servants are dead, and your servant Uriah the Hittite is dead also."
zh: 那時射手從城牆上射王的僕人；王的僕人中有些陣亡了，你的僕人赫人烏利亞也死了。”

en: David said to the messenger, "Thus shall you say to Joab, 'Do not let this matter trouble you, for the sword devours now one and now another. Strengthen your attack against the city and overthrow it.' And encourage him."
zh: 大衛對那使者說：“你要對約押這樣說：‘不要為這件事難過，因為刀劍有時吞滅這人，有時吞滅那人。你只要加緊攻打這城，把城毀滅。’你要這樣鼓勵他。”

en: When the wife of Uriah heard that Uriah her husband was dead, she lamented over her husband.
zh: 烏利亞的妻子聽到丈夫烏利亞死了，就為他哀哭。

en: And when the mourning was over, David sent and brought her to his house, and she became his wife and bore him a son. But the thing that David had done displeased the LORD.
zh: 守喪期一過，大衛就派人去把拔示巴接到宮裡，她就作了大衛的妻子，給大衛生了一個兒子。大衛所作的這事，耶和華看為惡。
